About SOMVISCON

A partner for practical delivery and accountable reform

Who We Are

Local understanding. Global standards.

Som Vision Consultancy Services (SOMVISCON) Ltd is a professional consultancy firm delivering expert solutions, strategic guidance, and tailored support to organizations across sectors in Somalia.

Somalia's development agenda requires institutions that can plan, deliver, and adapt. SOMVISCON provides consulting grounded in local realities and aligned with international standards.

We work alongside client teams to build systems, transfer knowledge, and strengthen institutional capacity rather than creating parallel structures.

What Sets Us Apart

Strong sector depth in labor, livestock, governance, and program delivery

Implementation-focused support

Embedded MEL and compliance discipline

Vision & Mission

Our Direction and Purpose

Vision

To be a trusted and innovative consultancy delivering impactful cross-sector solutions that enable institutions to grow and adapt.

Mission

To provide tailored, high-impact consulting services that strengthen performance, accountability, and sustainable growth across sectors.

In Practice

Focus on implementable solutions

Grounded in local context and practical delivery needs

Define outcomes early

Clear results frameworks and accountability measures from the start

Promote transparency

Rigorous reporting and ethical data handling throughout

Our Values

Values that protect trust, quality, and results

Integrity

Honesty and ethical standards in every engagement

Excellence

Highest quality in analysis, advice, and implementation

Professionalism

Rigorous standards across all client interactions

Innovation

Creative, evidence-based solutions to complex challenges

Partnership

Lasting relationships with clients and institutions

Accountability

Clear reporting and transparent delivery

Confidentiality

Protecting client data and sensitive information

Sustainability

Long-term institutional strengthening and lasting impact

Leadership & Team

A multidisciplinary team built for delivery

Led by a Board of Directors and a Managing Director/CEO, supported by sector and technical teams.

We deploy small, accountable teams with technical leadership, delivery coordination, and MEL and data support.

Our Approach

From strategy to sustained delivery

1

Results-Based Design

We define outcomes, indicators, and risks early through structured results frameworks.

2

Delivery Systems

We build and strengthen registries, reporting tools, and service delivery platforms.

3

Adaptive Management

We use learning and real-time feedback to improve implementation continuously.

4

Accountability

We align evaluation and reporting to international standards including OECD DAC and UN norms.

Ready to work with us?

Let us discuss how SOMVISCON can support your program goals.

Start a Conversation
